name: Secondary Folder Tree
description: Browse a second folder side-by-side with the main explorer. Pin any path on disk, expand subfolders, double-click to open in the editor.
author: ilhamrisky

settings.label: Default folder
settings.description: Absolute path that the panel opens to. Leave empty to start at the user's home folder.

settings.label: Open on startup
settings.description: When enabled, the secondary tree opens automatically the first time TEDI launches each session.
